stemHtml:
Given the following information, determine the defactored landing distance for a multi-engined Performance Class B aeroplane operated for Commercial Air Transport.

Landing distance available: 4300 ft
Runway surface: Paved asphalt
Runway condition: Wet (factor 1.15)
Runway slope: 0.5% downslope
The landing distance should be increased by 5% for each 1% downslope.
